text: I feel curious and contemplative, immersed in an environment devoted to innovation and inquiry. The room beyond the glass gives off a sense of preparation—a space in waiting, inviting reflection or future conversation. Stepping into the exhibit, the bold patterns and references to 'R+D' evoke excitement and a longing to understand how humans and technology shape one another. I sense the weight of ideas, both visible and hidden, and feel inspired by the pursuit of knowledge.
